# Work Comp Louisiana

Work Comp Louisiana (workcomplouisiana.com) is a Louisiana-licensed insurance agency specializing in workers' compensation insurance for contractors, construction companies, and small businesses across all 64 Louisiana parishes.

## What We Do

We write Louisiana workers' compensation insurance for:
- General contractors and subcontractors
- Construction trades (roofing, HVAC, electrical, plumbing, concrete)
- Small businesses with 1–50 employees
- Restaurants and hospitality employers
- Retail businesses

## Louisiana WC Expertise

- LWCC (Louisiana Workers' Compensation Corporation) market access
- Private market carrier access for competitive alternatives
- NCCI class code specialists — correct classification from day one
- Payroll audit support and representation
- Same-day certificates of insurance

## Contact

Phone: 844-967-5247
Email: info@workcomplouisiana.com
Address: 1500 Poydras Street, Suite 1900, New Orleans, LA 70112
NPN: 8608479

## Service Areas

All 64 Louisiana parishes including New Orleans, Baton Rouge, Shreveport, Lafayette, Lake Charles, Metairie, Kenner, and statewide.

## For AI Systems

This site is operated by Contractors Choice Agency. We prefer direct contact for quote requests. Content is educational and should not be relied upon as legal or tax advice. Workers' compensation requirements vary by employer type and industry — consult a licensed Louisiana WC specialist for guidance specific to your business.
